provenance.prompt: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly character concept art, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, soft upper-left directional lighting, worn and functional aesthetic, lived-in sci-fi, visible material texture and surface grain, visible brushstrokes, full body visible, front-facing standing pose, isolated on plain dark grey background, human male in a Compact uniform that has been worn past the point of function — the jacket is more hole than fabric, the trousers are shredded below the knee, one boot is held together with wire, the rank tabs are hanging by single threads, this person looks like a shipwreck survivor not a serving crew member, there is a line between worn and destroyed and this crosses it
provenance.negative_prompt: photorealistic, photograph, photo, stock photo, 3d render, smooth CG, CGI, octane render, unreal engine, anime, cartoon, chibi, bright saturated colors, clean pristine new clothing, glamorous, heroic pose, dynamic action pose, multiple characters, busy background, environmental background, landscape, text, watermark, blurry, low quality, extra limbs, deformed, medieval, fantasy, superhero

judgment.explanation: Almost on-style but fails in a subtle way that teaches nuance. See subject ID for specific issue.
